originalInstruction: Complete all of the above steps until the LLM Wiki is live, pushed, shipped, and working. Verified.
productContract: Citadel's LLM Wiki skill must be visible in the shipped public docs/demo, must route LLM Wiki phrasing to /wiki in the demo router, and must remain lint-clean as one of the 45 installed skills.
environmentOfUse: Citadel repository and GitHub Pages docs site: skills/wiki/SKILL.md, docs/index.html, docs/SKILLS.md, QUICKSTART.md, scripts/test-demo.js, https://sethgammon.github.io/Citadel/ after GitHub Pages deployment.

proofCommands.command: Google Chrome headless --dump-dom file:///Users/wilhorneff/Projects/Citadel/docs/index.html | rg -n 'LLM-native markdown knowledge base|/wiki|Skills - 45 installed'

requiredEvidence.description: skills/wiki/SKILL.md exists and passes Citadel skill lint in the full test suite.
docs/index.html Skills panel includes /wiki with the LLM-native markdown knowledge base description.
The demo router maps 'build an llm wiki' to /wiki at Tier 2 and scripts/test-demo.js has a regression for that case.
After merge, GitHub Pages deploys origin/main and the public URL contains /wiki and the LLM Wiki description.

falseDoneCounterexample: A false completion would have skills/wiki/SKILL.md present and tests passing while the public demo site still lacks /wiki or routes 'llm wiki' to /archon, /research, or /marshal.

falseDoneGuard.oldPassingProof: Skill lint alone passed before this change even though the public demo did not expose /wiki.
falseDoneGuard.sharedWrongAssumption: Existing skill implementation could be mistaken for shipped public visibility.
falseDoneGuard.variedBoundary: Proof checks skill lint, demo route regression, rendered local DOM, PR/merge state, GitHub Pages deployment, and live public HTML.
falseDoneGuard.oldStateFailure: Live GitHub Pages HTML did not contain /wiki or the LLM Wiki description before the change.
falseDoneGuard.newStatePass: The public site contains /wiki and the LLM Wiki description after GitHub Pages deployment.

mitigationAssertion.description: The change exposes /wiki in docs, routes LLM Wiki phrasing to /wiki, updates stale docs counts, and adds a route regression so the public surface cannot silently drop it again.

blockedLivePath: None once GitHub Pages deployment succeeds. Until then, live/proved remains pending.
residualRisk: The public GitHub Pages site may take a short propagation delay after PR merge before serving the new HTML. Verify live HTML after the pages-build-deployment workflow succeeds.
